title: Release Candidate
description: Harden a release candidate through multi-project validation, rollback proof, risk closure, compatibility notes, and durability evidence.
phaseTargets: close high risks or mark NO-GO
architectureCriteria: upgrade and rollback paths are separated from normal runtime
audit and evidence stores are durable
compatibility and migration boundaries are documented
runtimeCriteria: representative or real projects reach terminal validation
rollback path is exercised through product APIs or release workflow
durability or soak evidence is collected for the requested scope
releaseCriteria: release notes and upgrade notes exist
high open risks are zero or explicitly accepted
